description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a prominent red gable roof and beige exterior walls accented by stone trim at the base. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden railings, decorative columns, and a central entryway with a double door and steps leading up from the ground. Large rectangular windows with blue-tinted glass are symmetrically placed on both the front and rear sides, providing ample natural light. The left side of the house has an attached carport with a matching roof, while the rear features an extended covered patio area with additional railing. A chimney protrudes from the roof, indicating a fireplace or heating system inside. The overall design is practical and inviting, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story house with a red gable roof, beige walls, stone trim, a covered front porch, and symmetrical windows. Features include a carport, rear patio, and central entryway with decorative columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, double doors, steps, and two large windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, chimney, and a large window; the carport is partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended covered patio, railing, and multiple large windows; steps lead up to the patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, two upper windows, and the carport structure extending from the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double door with steps, covered porch, wooden railings, decorative columns, and a gabled overhang
